f GitHub, which the company bought for $7.5 billion in 2018. — and that changes everything you knew about OpenAI.

GitHub was there first, having announced Copilot in 2021 . The software repository market saw a surge in usage with the onset of AI-assisted coding, or vibe coding, as agentic AI allowed developers to ramp up their production.

🔹 Microsoft had all the pieces to win in vibe coding, thanks to the near ubiquity of GitHub, which the company bought for $7.5 billion in 2018.
⚡ “Obviously, GitHub also finds itself in the midst of the agentic coding revolution and that causes enormous pressure on the folks over there.
🧠 Microsoft’s GitHub was positioned to win the AI coding race.
📊 The attacker was able to obtain about 3,800 of GitHub’s own code libraries.
🔬 We and our partners also use tools on this site to provide the services, personalize your experience, and for analytics, marketing, and.

Do you think OpenAI's move here is exciting or a risk? Drop your take below.

📰 Source: cnbc.com
🔗 https://www.cnbc.com/2026/05/22/microsoft-was-positioned-to-win-in-ai-coding-outages-got-in-the-way.html
